Loading file "sporadic_list.txt"
> function MiddleCohomology(weights,deg)
function> dim := #weights - 2;
function> P<t> := PowerSeriesRing(Rationals(),(dim+1)*deg-&+weights+1);
function> f := &*[1-t^(deg-weights[i]):i in [1 .. dim+2]] * &*[1/(1-t^(weights\
[i])):i in [1 .. dim+2]];
function> return [0: j in [0 .. dim] | (j+1)*deg - &+weights lt 0] cat [Coeffi\
cient(f,(j+1)*deg - &+weights): j in [0 .. dim] | (j+1)*deg - &+weights ge 0];
function> end function;
> 
> cohomology_list := []; 
> for i in [1 .. 4442] do
for> weights := sporadic[i];
for> deg := &+weights -1;
for> h12 := MiddleCohomology(weights,deg)[2];
for> Append(~cohomology_list,<i,h12>);
for> end for;
> cohomology_list;
